title: Elgin Opera House
summary: The Elgin Opera House, located at 100 North 8th Street in Elgin, Oregon, United States, is listed (under the name Elgin City Hall and Opera House) on the National Register of Historic Places.
text: The Elgin Opera House, located at 100 North 8th Street in Elgin, Oregon, United States, is listed (under the name Elgin City Hall and Opera House) on the National Register of Historic Places.
